description: The skagen Denmark Collection reflects creative Danish spirit with clean, elegant designs, creative craftsmanship and technical perfection. The small seaside village of Skagen, Denmark with its natural purity and beauty, continues to be the inspiration for all Skagen Denmark products. Choose this watch to express exquisite taste and attention to detail. Case diameter: 38 mm Case thickness: 5 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: International Limited Lifetime Warranty Copper coloured steel round case Brown leather strap with a tang clasp Brown dial with silver coloured hands 3-faced multifunction display Branding at the 12 hour mark Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rain
